assunto-home: I am a Software Engineering student focused on web development. This portfolio showcases projects, technical skills, and experiences developed throughout my academic journey and personal studies.
assunto-sobremim: I am a Software Engineering student interested in software development and modern web technologies. I have experience with Java and Object-Oriented Programming, as well as building web interfaces using JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Currently, I am expanding my knowledge in React and exploring backend development with technologies such as Spring Boot.
habilidade-descricao: Technologies, tools, and programming concepts developed through academic projects and practical studies, including web development, object-oriented programming, and version control.
descricao-experiencia: Development of academic systems applying concepts such as object-oriented programming, data structures, and software design. Practical experience using Java, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and version control with Git and GitHub.
descricao-experiencia2: Participation in the development of a web application using PHP, Laravel, and Livewire. The project involved backend logic implementation, database interaction, and development of responsive web interfaces.
descricao-experiencia3: Development of personal and experimental projects to deepen knowledge in full-stack development, including Java applications, web interfaces, and experiments with React and API integration.
descricao-pdf: This document provides an overview of my Software Engineering background, technical skills, academic experiences, and projects developed throughout my learning journey.
